mapper.select: SELECT code, name, sector, industry, market, cik, last_update AS lastUpdate FROM company_info_us WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{name}), '%') ORDER BY name

SELECT code, name, sector, industry, market, cik, last_update AS lastUpdate FROM company_info_us WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{keyword}) THEN 0 WHEN LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{keyword}) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, name LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT code, name, sector, industry, market, cik, last_update AS lastUpdate FROM company_info_us WHERE code = #{code}
